mainFeatures.heading: Powerful Monitoring Features
mainFeatures.description: A comprehensive suite of tools designed for seamless, invisible background tracking and digital safety.

cards.card1Desc: Best Free Keylogger can record all keystrokes, internet activity, clipboard activity, and local application usage while capturing screenshots of on-going activities on the target computer at set intervals.
cards.card2Desc: Best Free Keylogger is equipped with an easy-to-use, but extremely powerful report viewer and screenshot viewer. With unique "Smart-Read" feature on Best Free Keylogger, keystroke reports become highly user-friendly and easy to read.
cards.card3Desc: Reports generated by Best Free Keylogger can be emailed or uploaded to an FTP server of your choice. You can also configure Best Free Keylogger to send reports to a computer on the same LAN or to copy logs to a USB drive automatically when plugged in.
